# DigiPrezence — Premium Digital Presence for Ambitious Small Businesses
> SEO, Web Development, Social Media Management, and GEO services based in Kadapa, India.

## Services
- [Web & Product Development](https://digiprezence.com/web-product-services): SEO-focused websites, landing pages, and product development for small businesses
- [Social Media & Content](https://digiprezence.com/social-content-services): Content calendars, brand copywriting, and search-aware content systems
- [Talent & Growth Consulting](https://digiprezence.com/talent-consultancy-services): Digital growth strategy, hiring support, and channel planning
- [Paid Ads Management](https://digiprezence.com/paid-ads-services): Google Ads, Meta Ads, and CPL optimization

## Company
- [About](https://digiprezence.com/about): Founded by Suresh Kalava with 8+ years of digital marketing experience
- [Work](https://digiprezence.com/work): Case studies across healthcare, local business, and SaaS
- [Pricing](https://digiprezence.com/pricing): Project-based and retainer engagement models
